entries.speaker: caden
lines: The ground is screaming. Can you not hear it? It has
been screaming for days.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: We're looking for Torren.

entries.speaker: caden
lines: At the nexus. He's been there since the rupture.
Performing a binding ritual. Pouring himself into the ward stones
to slow the corruption.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: How long can he sustain that?

entries.speaker: caden
lines: He can't. He's dying. But the alternative is losing
the nexus, and if that goes, the entire Wilds go with it.

entries.speaker: yara
lines: You came. I told Torren someone would come. He said
the totems would have shaken if anyone was going to help.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: The totems are wrong.

entries.speaker: yara
lines: I know. I can't sleep. The ley lines used to sing
in harmonics. Three voices, overlapping. Now there's only one
voice, and it's not singing. It's just... exhaling. Over and
over.

entries.speaker: yara
lines: He's been at the nexus for eleven days. He stopped
eating on day three. I bring water. He doesn't always drink it.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Torren. Torren!

entries.speaker: edren
lines: He's holding it back by himself. If he lets go—

entries.speaker: lira
lines: The Leech is anchored to the ley line. We have to
sever its connection before Torren can let go.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Then we sever it.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: ...Sable?

entries.speaker: sable
lines: Yeah. Me. The useless one.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: You are many things. Useless is not one of them.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: The nexus held. I felt it shift. Whatever you did—

entries.speaker: sable
lines: We killed the thing eating it. Pretty straightforward.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: This is the first sign. The Pallor can be pushed back.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: You came back.

entries.speaker: yara
lines: I can hear it again. The harmonics. Faint, but there.

entries.speaker: yara
lines: Thank you.
